channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: No clear path to ending the partial government shutdown as lawmakers dig in over DHS oversight
Glove found near Guthrie's home appears to match video, has DNA, FBI says
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show co-host Savannah Guthrie, was last seen on Jan. 31 and was reported missing the following day, Feb. 1.

item.title: Canada shooter's online activity shows fascination with violence, expert says
item.description: The online activity of the shooter at a Canadian high school revealed she spent time in the dark corners of the internet.

item.title: A timeline of Nancy Guthrie's disappearance as search stretches on
item.description: Savannah Guthrie's mom, Nancy Guthrie, was reported missing Feb. 1.

item.title: 2/15: Sunday Morning
item.description: Hosted by Jane Pauley. Featured: Gisèle Pelicot discusses her mass rape trial; singer Paul Anka; sports commentator Stephen A. Smith; actor Jacob Elor...

item.title: WATCH: Former President Obama responds to President Trump’s racist video post
item.description: Barack Obama spoke out a week after President Trump's social media account posted a video depicting him and Michelle Obama as apes, condemning behavio...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Male DNA lifted from glove found near Guthrie home
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: Obama on ICE shootings in Minnesota: "This is not the America we believe in"
item.description: President Obama spoke about the "unprecedented nature" of what he said Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents did in Minnesota.

item.title: Rep. Massie says he doesn't have confidence in Bondi as attorney general
item.description: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie says he doesn't approve of how AG Pam Bondi conducted herself after Wednesday's clash over DOJ's Epstein files in House ...

item.title: WATCH: Popcorn machine catches fire during college basketball game
item.description: Play was briefly stopped during the first half of Saturday's game between the Oklahoma Sooners and Georgia Bulldogs after a popcorn machine caught fir...

item.title: Trump’s border czar says ‘small’ security force will remain in Minnesota after enforcement drawdown
FBI: DNA recovered from glove found near Guthrie home that appears to match glove worn by suspect
item.description: The FBI says a glove containing DNA was found about two miles from Nancy Guthrie’s Arizona home and appears to match those worn by a masked person out...

item.title: WATCH: Golden retriever puppy perplexed by butterfly perched on its face
item.description: This adorable golden retriever puppy looked slightly perplexed as a butterfly perched on its forehead in Oceanside, California.
